racing.dream: A cockpit that disappears around you when the lights go out.
racing.reality: The frame, brake deck, sightline, and software profile decide whether expensive force feedback feels precise or merely loud.

stages.title: Foundation
stages.decision: Wheel stand, tubular cockpit, or aluminum profile
stages.warning: Match stiffness to brake force and peak torque before choosing the wheelbase.

stages.title: Primary controls
stages.decision: Load-cell brake, wheelbase, rim, and shifters
stages.warning: Pedal consistency usually buys more lap time than another jump in torque.

stages.title: Visual field
stages.decision: Single display, ultrawide, triples, or VR
stages.warning: FOV and mounting geometry matter more than the panel's marketing name.

stages.title: Feedback layer
stages.decision: Audio, bass shakers, haptic seat, or motion
stages.warning: Add physical effects only after the cockpit stops flexing and the telemetry is clean.

golf.dream: A private practice room that is always dry, open, and yours.
golf.reality: Ceiling, swing width, tee depth, projector throw, screen buffer, and subscription cost all get veto power.

stages.title: Room geometry
stages.decision: Ceiling, width, depth, handedness, and tee line
stages.warning: Measure the golfer's real driver swing, not an optimistic rectangle on graph paper.

stages.title: Launch data
stages.decision: Photometric, radar, floor, or overhead monitor
stages.warning: The room chooses the sensor technology before reviews choose the brand.

stages.title: Impact system
stages.decision: Mat, screen, enclosure, padding, and landing turf
stages.warning: The mat protects joints and the enclosure protects everything else.

stages.title: Image and software
stages.decision: Projector, aspect ratio, PC, courses, and subscriptions
stages.warning: Throw geometry and software lock-in can cost more than the launch monitor discount saved.

flight.dream: A clean flight deck where every movement has a physical answer.
flight.reality: Primary controls, rudder authority, viewing position, USB power, and saved profiles matter before decorative panels.

stages.title: Aircraft and controls
stages.decision: Yoke or stick, throttle, and rudder pedals
stages.warning: Buy for the aircraft you actually fly, not the cockpit photo you admire.

stages.title: View and position
stages.decision: Monitor, head tracking, VR, and mount height
stages.warning: A good sightline and head tracking often beat another panel for immersion.

stages.title: Power and profiles
stages.decision: Powered USB, device order, firmware, and backups
stages.warning: A haunted cockpit is usually a topology problem before it is a dead peripheral.

stages.title: Panels later
stages.decision: Radio, autopilot, FMC, and switch modules
stages.warning: Only add a panel after you know which keyboard reach keeps breaking the flight.

space.dream: A command station that makes six-axis movement feel native instead of mapped.
space.reality: HOSAS versus HOTAS, mounting, button layers, power, and binding discipline decide whether the desk becomes a cockpit.

stages.title: Flight role
stages.decision: Dogfight, haul, mine, explore, or crew
stages.warning: Your in-game job decides HOSAS, HOTAS, or the hybrid that makes sense.

stages.title: Axes and grips
stages.decision: Dual sticks, throttle, pedals, and twist
stages.warning: Count the axes and buttons you need under stress before comparing metal content.

stages.title: Mount and reach
stages.decision: Desk clamps, chair mounts, 8020, and keyboard access
stages.warning: Premium gimbals on bad mounts still move in the wrong direction.

stages.title: Bindings and power
stages.decision: Layers, curves, exported profiles, powered USB
stages.warning: The first night is configuration. Save the profile before the next patch teaches that lesson again.

marine.dream: A working bridge where helm, throttle, and instruments answer like a system.
marine.reality: Software support is thin, so controller translation, generic HID boards, labels, and repeatable profiles do the heavy lifting.

stages.title: Software reality
stages.decision: Native axes, keyboard commands, telemetry, and VR support
stages.warning: Do not buy hardware until the simulator proves it can read the control you want.

stages.title: Helm and throttle
stages.decision: Repurposed wheel, stick, quadrant, or DIY lever
stages.warning: Continuous rotation and clear detents matter more than marine branding.

stages.title: Control bridge
stages.decision: Mapping software, button boards, rotary encoders, and labels
stages.warning: The useful bridge is the one every guest can operate without asking what button 17 does.

stages.title: Profiles and testing
stages.decision: Calibration, backups, failure drills, and game-specific maps
stages.warning: Save a known-good profile before every update and test it away from the dock.
